name: Crib and Changing Play Set for 14" - 16" Dolls - Gigglescape™
description:
Help your kiddo take good care of their dolls with the Crib and Changing Play Set for Dolls from Gigglescape™. This playset includes a crib, changing table, wipes, diaper cream and a plush bear to help keep them busy in pretend play. Suggested for children ages two years and above, the crib fits 14-16 inch dolls.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
